gold.title: Morphing Page Dots
gold.reason: Morphing dot pagination indicator — visually stunning motion effect great for carousels and sliders on marketing sites.

gold.title: Sliding Pagination
gold.reason: Sliding animated pagination — smooth and polished transition between pages, elevates gallery and portfolio sections.

gold.title: Stack Pagination
gold.reason: Stacked card pagination effect — distinctive visual metaphor impressive in product showcases.

gold.title: Wheel Pagination
gold.reason: Wheel-scroll pagination — unique interaction that stands out on immersive marketing sites.

gold.title: Animated Number Flip
gold.reason: Flip animation for page numbers — polished detail that elevates pagination from utility to delight.

gold.title: Pagination
gold.reason: Neobrutalism-styled pagination — distinctive visual style that fits design-forward marketing sites.

gold.title: Stepper
gold.reason: Stepper/progress pagination — essential for multi-step forms and onboarding flows on SaaS sites.

silver.title: Numbered Pagination
silver.reason: Numbered pagination with clean styling — reliable and well-designed for content-heavy pages.

silver.title: Compact Pagination
silver.reason: Space-efficient compact pagination — useful for tables and data-dense sections.

silver.title: Joined Pagination
silver.reason: Joined button-group pagination — clean segmented control style for navigation.

silver.title: Pagination with text buttons
silver.reason: Text-button pagination — minimal and content-forward style for editorial sites.

silver.title: Icon Pagination
silver.reason: Icon-only pagination — clean minimal navigation for image galleries.

silver.title: Scroll Pagination
silver.reason: Scroll-triggered pagination — useful for infinite-scroll and lazy-load patterns.

silver.title: Pagination
silver.reason: Clean prev/next pagination — well-described and production-ready.

silver.title: Next Gen Pagination Accessible
silver.reason: Accessible next-gen pagination — good a11y baseline for public-facing sites.

silver.title: Pagination Ant
silver.reason: Ant Design-style pagination — familiar enterprise pattern with good feature set.
